spot_check_summary.production_enablement: still requires operator decision; this artifact only checks the accepted semantic edges

semantic_merges.left_text: I applied and was granted a forbearance with XXXX mortgage. During my forebearance period, XXXX sold my loan and the new serviced became LoanCare.
semantic_merges.right_text: XXXX mortgage sold our loan to LoanCare ( XXXX ). We applied and were approved for HAF of {$16000.00}.
semantic_merges.reason: mortgage servicing transfer and LoanCare hardship/payment handling

semantic_merges.left_text: I became very ill and fell behind my payments for my Discover card.
semantic_merges.right_text: My health has taken a toll with my work. I have been trying to pay.

semantic_merges.left_text: I used my Capital One credit card to purchase flights from the travel website.
semantic_merges.right_text: I made a reservation through the credit card travel website for my vacation.

semantic_merges.left_text: What should I do if I was the victim of a rental scam and my bank is refusing to restore funds?
semantic_merges.right_text: My financial institution is refusing to dispute, stop payment, or reclaim lost funds from this rental scam.

semantic_merges.left_text: What should I do if I got a payday advance from this company?
semantic_merges.right_text: What should I do if I received a pay day loan?
semantic_merges.reason: payday advance/payday loan same wording variant

semantic_merges.left_text: Excess charges to my account without disclosure or explanation; account balance reflects a negative balance.
semantic_merges.right_text: Saying my checking account is negative through email and unknown charges to my account.
semantic_merges.reason: unexpected account charges causing negative balance

semantic_merges.left_text: A credit-card charge was disputed with the card company and fraud department.
semantic_merges.right_text: Fraud charges on a Citi credit card were disputed with Citi Bank.

semantic_merges.left_text: Bank of America started charging a monthly fee after years without the fee.
semantic_merges.right_text: Fifth Third bank started charging my checking account a monthly service fee after years with no fee.

semantic_merges.left_text: I sent my rent to my landlord and later realized it was cashed unexpectedly.
semantic_merges.right_text: I sent money via Cash App for rent and a service fee to the rental company.
